name: detail-view
description: A single-record view that is state-complete by construction: a skeleton while it loads, a not-found panel for the empty status, error + retry and announcements. You only write the resolved record.

notes: Renders the record inside a labelled region
Treats the empty status as 'not found' and announces it via the StateBoundary live region
Loading skeleton is aria-hidden and the region is aria-busy

intents: show the detail of a single fetched record with loading and not-found states
a record / entity detail page that handles missing data
single-item view with a skeleton and retry
